overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic desert city. The player navigates from a busy multi-lane street with an overhead monorail track, through an intersection, past a communications facility with satellite dishes, along a construction zone with heavy machinery, and finally approaches an industrial warehouse entrance. The environment features bright midday sun, modern glass skyscrapers mixed with industrial structures, and distant desert mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane urban arterial with overhead monorail track

events.description: passing a red compact car and blue delivery truck stopped in traffic
beginning to turn left at the intersection while approaching crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to moving traffic, passing various vehicles including a military-style truck

notable_agents.action: large military-style truck moving slowly in traffic ahead of the player

entered.detail: curved elevated track structure spanning across the street
tall futuristic building with reflective glass facade and multiple levels
tall dark fence with horizontal slats running along the sidewalk
large vertical screen displaying animated advertisements on building facade

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a busy multi-lane street under a bright midday sun. An arching monorail bridge spans overhead while modern glass skyscrapers rise on the left. The player passes various vehicles including a red car and military truck, with a concrete sound barrier running along the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection crossing leading to communications facility

events.description: turning left from main street onto crosswalk, leaving the arterial road
crossing the intersection between moving vehicles while traffic light is green

agents.ego_description: turning left at the intersection, crossing the street, and continuing along a sidewalk lined with palm trees

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking along the sidewalk near the satellite dish building

entered.detail: low black industrial building with multiple large white satellite dishes on roof
line of tall palm trees along the sidewalk edge
green street sign mounted on traffic light pole indicating intersection

segments.scene_description: The player turns left at the San Amaro intersection, crossing between vehicles to enter a new zone. A distinctive black communications building with large satellite dishes dominates the right side, lined with palm trees. The concrete sidewalk transitions from the busy street to a more open pedestrian area.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial construction zone with heavy machinery and safety barriers

events.description: entering the construction zone area with visible cranes and heavy equipment
passing by yellow construction excavators behind orange safety barriers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the path next to an active construction site, observing the heavy machinery and industrial structures

entered.detail: multiple yellow excavators and cranes working behind barriers
orange and white striped construction barriers lining the road
large metal framework and piping structures part of the construction
arid mountain range visible in the distance beyond the city

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a lengthy construction zone bordered by orange safety barriers. Yellow excavators and cranes operate behind the barriers, with desert mountains visible in the background. The monorail track curves overhead while the environment takes on a more industrial character with exposed piping and scaffolding.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial warehouse entrance with loading dock

events.description: approaching the large industrial building with red structural trim
entering the shadow of the building as approaching the covered entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the industrial building entrance, passing pedestrians standing near the doorway

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians standing near the building entrance, one with red hair

entered.detail: massive warehouse structure with dark facade and red structural beams
covered loading dock entrance with overhead fluorescent lighting

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a massive industrial warehouse with distinctive red structural trim. As they near the entrance, the lighting shifts to mixed as the building casts shadows. The scene transitions from the open construction zone to a semi-covered loading dock area where a few pedestrians stand near the entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bustling urban thoroughfare into a heavy industrial zone under a bright midday sun. It begins by moving along a multi-lane street beneath an arching monorail bridge, passing glass skyscrapers and military vehicles. As the camera turns left at the San Amaro intersection, the scene shifts from the busy road to a pedestrian area dominated by a black communications building and satellite dishes. The path then expands into a lengthy construction zone where orange safety barriers and yellow excavators lead the eye toward distant desert mountains. Finally, the environment transitions from the open construction site into the shadows of a massive industrial warehouse with red structural trim as the camera approaches a semi-covered loading dock.
